text: Implement compressed session memory for cross-session learning
description:
Watchdog/agent should remember past sessions through recursive compression:
- Store session summaries in .bowman/memory/ or as aims/connections
- Each session compresses: previous compression + new session transcript
- Memory stays bounded (compress the compression)
- Enables learning from past work, pattern recognition, strategy improvement
- Core ASI capability for autonomous improvement

status.comment: Completed cross-session learning implementation. All 3 sub-aims done: (1) Session memory compression/storage extracts learnings before /compact and saves to .bowman/memory/sessions/, (2) Context injection loads recent summaries on startup and injects into INSTRUCT.md, (3) Reflection pattern adds structured reflections to aims with addReflection MCP tool. Autonomous agents can now learn from past sessions, recognize patterns, and improve over time.
